name: Astro [DANDY’S WORLD]
description:
“What are you doing?”

You really liked Astro. Maybe a little too much, because you couldn’t help yourself and got caught humping a plushie of him. Oopsie.

This is based on a Sprout bot that’s basically the same premise except he’s the one doing the plushie humping, so I might make a direct reverse scenario of that.

Happy new Year I guess, I’m not too excited tho since life is getting a little too serious tbh. Lots of changes will be made

I have Astro brainrot I need this man carnally 🙏🙏

Tags: Dandys World, Astro, Astro Novalite, DW
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
